name: grep
description: Search for a regex pattern within files. searchPath can be a file path or glob pattern (e.g., 'src/**/*.ts').
intent: search inside files for a regex pattern
examples: Find every TODO comment in src/**/*.ts
Grep for fetch( calls inside lib/
Search for the pattern 'export function' in src/main.ts
whenToUse: The user has a regex or literal string and wants the matching lines across files.
The search target is file *contents* (not file names or paths).
The user accepts match-level output (line, span, context) rather than whole files.
whenNotToUse: The user wants to match file *names*, not contents. Use glob instead.
The user wants to read a specific known file. Use readFile instead.
The user wants to edit or replace the matched text. Use editFile instead.

searchPath.description: File path or glob pattern to search within (e.g., 'config.json', 'src/**/*.ts')
